# Copilot Custom Instructions for cloudless.gr

- Use Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Vuetify 3, Pinia, Supabase, and TypeScript best practices in all code suggestions.
- Prefer composables and modular components for maintainability.
- Always use double quotes for JavaScript/TypeScript and follow the project's indentation style.
- When suggesting UI, use Vuetify components and match the existing design.
- For database access, use Supabase client and reference the correct environment variables.
- Add clear comments for complex logic and new features.
- When refactoring, avoid breaking existing API and UI contracts.
- For bot, model, and pipeline features, follow the established folder and file structure.
- When creating new files, place them in the appropriate directory (e.g., components, composables, pages).
- Always validate forms and handle errors gracefully in UI code.
- Use async/await for all asynchronous operations.
- When in doubt, prefer clarity and maintainability over cleverness.
